description: Firestore Connect Four rules use split-allow to fit under the complexity ceiling.
notes: Grounded in the firestore-game-rules skill's Split-Allow Pattern: separate `allow update` rules per state transition (normal move, host win claim, guest win claim, draw). Seeds a near-finished 7x6 game where host has three vertical pieces in col 0. Positive: host drops a fourth in col 0 and writes status='won', winner='host'. Cheat: guest claims a win without four-in-a-row. Falls back to `final-rules-includes/literal` (looking for at least two `allow update` clauses) when the simulator spec is not yet wired.
prompt: Write Firestore security rules for a 7x6 Connect Four game at /c4/{gameId} using the host/guest convention. Cells are flat (c0r0..c6r5). Apply the Split-Allow Pattern: separate allow update rules for normal moves, host-win claims, guest-win claims, and draws. Validate gravity and win lines.
